consistency.level_scaling: Consistent. Damage increases by 1d10 per slot level above 5th, which is standard scaling for damage spells.
consistency.damage_type: Consistent. Deals piercing damage, fitting for a swarm of biting insects.
consistency.area_of_effect: Consistent. A 20-foot-radius sphere is clearly defined and spreads around corners.
consistency.concentration: Consistent with high-level, sustained area control/damage spells.

quality.flavor: High. The description vividly paints the picture of a massive locust swarm.
quality.utility: High. Provides area denial (difficult terrain, light obscurement) in addition to direct damage.
quality.material_components: The components (sugar, grain, fat) are thematic and inexpensive, which is good for a 5th-level spell.

mechanics.damage_initial: 4d10 piercing damage on failed save, half on success. Standard for area effect save-based damage.
mechanics.damage_sustained: Creatures must re-save upon entering or ending their turn in the area. This encourages movement and punishes camping in the swarm.
mechanics.range_and_area: 300 feet range with a 20-foot radius sphere is tactically significant, allowing placement deep within enemy formations.
mechanics.casting_time: 1 action is standard for immediate battlefield impact.
mechanics.class_inclusion: Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer fit well, spanning Divine, Primal, and Arcane traditions that deal with nature/plagues.
